---
title: 'Krista Kraskura'
image: media/fish.png
about:
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 40em
  links: 
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/kraskura
    - text: ResearchGate
      icon: researchgate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Krista-Kraskura
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:kkraskura@towson.edu
      
---

## Sveiki! Hello 

{{< fa-solid fa-earth-americas title = "World">}}

Personal blurb 

## Education 

## Hobbies
